items.title: Solomon's Folly
items.description:
Gang Hideout

Del Lobo's hideout

A huge stack of bills can be found in the basement beneath the burnt house.

items.title: Twin Rocks
items.description:
Gang Hideout

Note: Only available for owners of the Special / Ultimate Edition of the game.

Note: There's a Gold Nugget in the night stand of the middle cabin

items.title: Skinner Brothers Hideout
items.description:
Gang Hideout

NB: The Skinner Brothers hideouts are secret hideouts that don't always spawn. This one appears to spawn in the morning.

items.title: Skinner Brothers Hideout
items.description:
Gang Hideout

NB: The Skinner Brothers hideouts are secret hideouts that don't always spawn.

items.description:

items.title: Skinner Brothers Hideout

items.title: Hanging Dog Ranch
items.description:
Gang Hideout

Home to O'Driscolls during chapters 1-6, then occupied by the Laramie Gang during the epilogue.

items.title: Six Point Cabin
items.description:
Gang Hideout

O'Driscolls hideout

Note: Cleared during the mission Paying a Social Call.

items.title: The American Inferno, Burnt Out
items.description:
Stranger

Quest Giver: Evelyn Miller
Requirements: Complete The Landowning Classes (Epilogue 1)

On a Hill overlooking West Elizabeth, you'll find Evelyn Miller sitting and writing (he's the author Dutch used to read frequently).

items.title: Arcadia For Amateurs (I)
items.description:
Stranger

Quest Giver: Albert Mason
Region: south-east of Strawberry
Requirements: none
Reward: Honor

items.title: Geology for Beginners
items.description:
Stranger

Quest Giver: Francis Sinclair

Region: Hut north-west of Strawberry

Requirements: Chapter 2 onwards

Rewards:
 Old Brass Compass
 Kentucky Bourbon
 Rock Statue

items.title: The Ties That Bind Us (V)
items.description:
Stranger

Quest Giver: Mr. Black & Mr. White (Chain Gang)

Requirements: Complete The Ties That Bind Us (IV)

items.title: Arcadia For Amateurs (II)
items.description:
Stranger

Quest Giver: Albert Mason
Region: North-west of Wallace Station
Requirements: Complete Arcadia For Amateurs (I)

items.title: To The Ends of the Earth (III)
items.description:
Stranger

Quest Giver: William
Requirements: Chapter 2 onwards
Reward: Horse Reviver

items.title: Oh, Brother (III)
items.description:
Stranger

Quest Giver: Proetus & Acrisius
Requirements: Complete Oh, Brother part 1 & part 2

items.title: Blackjack
items.description: May only be available after The Smell of the Grease Paint

items.title: Doctor
items.description: Valentine's local physician sells various remedies, tonics, and pick-me-ups, and will buy and health-related items you have to spare.

items.title: Fence Vendor
items.description:
Requirements: Only available after completing Horse Flesh for Dinner.

Davies Brothers Superior Livestock Dealers.

Will pay more than a stable for stolen or wild horses

items.title: Fence Vendor
items.description:
Requirements: Chapter 2 - unlocked after 'The Spines of America'.

The only fence who will buy stolen stagecoaches and carriages.
